title: AI Gift Finder — ATC + Quality
description: Gift-finder demo dashboard. ATC events (per conversation, per model) on the left; built-in heuristic quality eval (pass rate, fail reasons by model) on the right. ATC + quality both ride Loki structured log events emitted by the add_to_cart tool and the nc-gift-finder specialist — no Prometheus scraping required.

panels.title: ATC events (last 1h)
panels.description: Total add-to-cart events the gift-finder triggered in the last hour — across all conversations and models.

panels.title: ATC by model — last 1h
panels.description: How many add-to-carts each underlying model produced. The bigger the bar, the better that model is at recommending gifts the shopper actually wants.

targets.expr: sum by (model) (count_over_time({service_namespace="observibelity",container="tool"} |~ "atc_event" | pattern `<_>atc_event source=<source> product_id=<pid> sku=<sku> qty=<qty> agent_name=<agent> model=<model> <_>` [1h]))

panels.title: ATC events/min — by source (live vs loadgen)
panels.description: Add-to-cart events per minute split by source. `live` = interactive demo clicks; `loadgen` = continuous k6 traffic. Lets you watch your own demo clicks land in real time without being drowned out by loadgen.

panels.title: Top conversations — ATCs per persona
panels.description: Which shoppers added the most items in the last hour. Useful to spot high-converting personas during a live demo.

targets.expr: topk(20, sum by (persona) (count_over_time({service_namespace="observibelity",container="tool"} |~ "atc_event" | pattern `<_>atc_event source=<source> product_id=<pid> sku=<sku> qty=<qty> agent_name=<agent> model=<model> persona=<persona> <_>` [1h])))

panels.title: Top products added (by SKU)
panels.description: Most-added SKUs in the last hour. Reveals which products the gift-finder is favoring.

targets.expr: topk(15, sum by (sku) (count_over_time({service_namespace="observibelity",container="tool"} |~ "atc_event" | pattern `<_>atc_event source=<source> product_id=<pid> sku=<sku> <_>` [1h])))

panels.title: 🎯 Response Quality — heuristic eval per turn
Quality pass rate (last 1h)
panels.description: Share of gift-finder turns that returned ≥3 product candidates, at least one within budget, with the reply text mentioning a product. Below 70% means the agent is struggling — usually the model is too small or the catalog is sparse.

panels.title: Pass vs fail rate (turns/min)
panels.description: Rolling pass/fail trend in turns per minute. Even when API requests are all 2xx, an LLM agent can quietly drift — this panel catches the drift before users do.

panels.title: Total turns evaluated (1h)
panels.description: Number of gift-finder turns scored against the heuristic eval in the last hour.

panels.title: Fail reasons by model — last 1h
panels.description: When the eval fails, why. Reasons: `missing_products` (<3 returned), `over_budget` (none under stated budget), `reply_no_product_mention` (model returned products but didn't name them in the prose).

targets.expr: sum by (model, reason) (count_over_time({service_namespace="observibelity",container="specialist"} |~ "nc_gift_finder_quality result=fail" | pattern `<_>nc_gift_finder_quality result=<result> reason=<reason> model=<model> <_>` [1h]))

panels.title: Per-model quality scorecard (last 1h)
panels.description: Pass count + fail count + pass-rate for each model. The model-winner story made literal.

targets.expr: sum by (model, result) (count_over_time({service_namespace="observibelity",container="specialist"} |~ "nc_gift_finder_quality" | pattern `<_>nc_gift_finder_quality result=<result> reason=<reason> model=<model> <_>` [1h]))
